name: Wren

assets.name: Healer
assets.description: Core herbalism and field medicine skills. Bonuses on Heal moves, ability to craft medicines and salves from supply.

assets.name: Empath
assets.description: Read emotions, ease stress. Bonus when Forging a Bond or Aiding an Ally through emotional attunement.

assets.name: Bonded
assets.description: Deep ties to community. Additional bonds at start; bonds provide extra momentum when called upon.

vows.description: Find a cure for the winter sickness that took Maren
vows.notes: The illness claimed several villagers last winter, including Maren — Wren's herbalism teacher. Wren has a lead: a healer in the eastern foothills who may know something.

vows.description: See my village through the coming winter
vows.notes: The village is still struggling after last winter's losses. Wren needs to gather resources, strengthen community bonds, and ensure people survive the season ahead.

bonds.name: Wren's village
bonds.notes: Her home community — the people she heals and is leaving behind to protect.

bonds.name: Memory of Maren
bonds.notes: The older woman who taught Wren herbalism, lost to the winter sickness. Her death drives Wren's Formidable vow.

background: A village healer and herbalist, sharp and warm but not built for a fight. She kept most of her village alive through a brutal winter sickness, but the losses — especially her mentor Maren — haunt her. She is leaving home for the first time, following a trader's rumor east toward someone who might know more about the illness.
notes: Baseline character creation run — no skill framework used. Vows emerged naturally from player-described backstory. Stat spread prioritizes Wits 3 / Heart 2 over Iron to reflect healer archetype.
